parameters.query:
WITH

tenants AS (
  SELECT
    t.id              AS tenant_id,
    t.full_name,
    t.preferred_name,
    COALESCE(bp.id::text, '')           AS business_id,
    COALESCE(bp.business_name, t.full_name, 'Unknown') AS business_name,
    COALESCE(bp.business_mode, '')      AS business_mode,
    COALESCE(mc.balance, 0)             AS credits_balance
  FROM table_1 t
  LEFT JOIN table_2 bp ON bp.tenant_id = t.id
  LEFT JOIN table_3 mc           ON mc.tenant_id = t.id
  WHERE t.telegram_id IS NOT NULL
),

daily_google AS (
  SELECT tenant_id,
    (created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Lagos')::date AS day,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM table_4
  column_1 'output_google'
    column_2 now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY tenant_id, day
),

daily_media AS (
  SELECT tenant_id,
    (created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Lagos')::date AS day,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM table_4
  WHERE action_type IN ('output_image','output_video')
    column_2 now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY tenant_id, day
),

daily_orders AS (
  SELECT ten.tenant_id,
    (co.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Lagos')::date AS day,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM table_5 co
  JOIN table_6 ten ON ten.business_id = co.business_id::text
  WHERE co.created_at > now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY ten.tenant_id, day
),

daily_dispatch AS (
  SELECT tenant_id,
    (created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Lagos')::date AS day,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM table_7
  column_2 now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY tenant_id, day
),

daily_followups_orders AS (
  SELECT ten.tenant_id,
    (co.followup_sent_at AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Lagos')::date AS day,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM table_5 co
  JOIN table_6 ten ON ten.business_id = co.business_id::text
  WHERE co.followup_sent_at IS NOT NULL
    AND co.followup_sent_at > now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY ten.tenant_id, day
),

daily_followups_escalations AS (
  SELECT tenant_id,
    (created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Lagos')::date AS day,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM table_8
  column_3 'replied'
    column_2 now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY tenant_id, day
),

daily_followups AS (
  SELECT tenant_id, day, SUM(cnt) AS cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT * FROM table_9
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM table_10
  ) combined
  GROUP BY tenant_id, day
),

daily_reminders AS (
  SELECT tenant_id,
    (created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Lagos')::date AS day,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM table_4
  WHERE action_type IN ('output_reminder','output_news')
    column_2 now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY tenant_id, day
),

daily_credits_spent AS (
  SELECT tenant_id,
    (created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Lagos')::date AS day,
    SUM(credits_used) AS naira_spent
  FROM table_4
  column_4 0
    column_2 now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY tenant_id, day
),

all_active_days AS (
  SELECT tenant_id, day FROM table_11   UNION
  SELECT tenant_id, day FROM table_12    UNION
  SELECT tenant_id, day FROM table_13   UNION
  SELECT tenant_id, day FROM table_14 UNION
  SELECT tenant_id, day FROM table_15 UNION
  SELECT tenant_id, day FROM table_16
)

SELECT
  COALESCE(t.tenant_id::text, ad.tenant_id::text)    AS tenant_id,
  COALESCE(t.full_name,     'Unknown')                AS full_name,
  COALESCE(t.preferred_name,t.full_name,'Unknown')    AS preferred_name,
  COALESCE(t.business_name, 'Unknown')                AS business_name,
  COALESCE(t.business_mode, '')                       AS business_mode,
  COALESCE(t.credits_balance, 0)                      AS credits_balance,
  ad.day::text                                         AS day,
  COALESCE(dcs.naira_spent, 0)                        AS daily_credits_spent,
  COALESCE(dg.cnt,  0)                                AS google,
  COALESCE(dm.cnt,  0)                                AS media,
  COALESCE(dor.cnt, 0)                                AS orders,
  COALESCE(dd.cnt,  0)                                AS dispatch,
  COALESCE(df.cnt,  0)                                AS followups,
  COALESCE(dr.cnt,  0)                                AS reminders
FROM table_17 ad
LEFT JOIN table_6 t               ON t.tenant_id  = ad.tenant_id
LEFT JOIN table_11 dg         ON dg.tenant_id = ad.tenant_id AND dg.day  = ad.day
LEFT JOIN table_12 dm          ON dm.tenant_id = ad.tenant_id AND dm.day  = ad.day
LEFT JOIN table_13 dor        ON dor.tenant_id= ad.tenant_id AND dor.day = ad.day
LEFT JOIN table_14 dd       ON dd.tenant_id = ad.tenant_id AND dd.day  = ad.day
LEFT JOIN table_15 df      ON df.tenant_id = ad.tenant_id AND df.day  = ad.day
LEFT JOIN table_16 dr      ON dr.tenant_id = ad.tenant_id AND dr.day  = ad.day
LEFT JOIN table_18 dcs ON dcs.tenant_id= ad.tenant_id AND dcs.day = ad.day
ORDER BY ad.day DESC, COALESCE(t.full_name,'Unknown')

' + $json.row_count + ' owner records · ' + $json.unique_days + ' days of history

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id::text                                               AS tenant_id,
  t.full_name,
  t.preferred_name,
  (t.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Lagos')::date::text   AS signup_date,
  COALESCE(mc.balance, 0)                                  AS credits_balance,
  COALESCE(
    string_agg(DISTINCT bp.business_name, ' · ' ORDER BY bp.business_name),
    t.full_name
  )                                                        AS business_names,
  COUNT(DISTINCT bp.id)                                    AS business_count
FROM table_1 t
LEFT JOIN table_3 mc           ON mc.tenant_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN table_2 bp ON bp.tenant_id = t.id
WHERE t.telegram_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY t.id, t.full_name, t.preferred_name, t.created_at, mc.balance
ORDER BY t.full_name
